channel.title: GNtravel
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from GNtravel, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 136 Hyatt Hotels Moving to New Award Categories on May 20
item.description: Hyatt is shifting 136 properties to new award categories on May 20, with changes to redemption costs affecting a range of resorts and other participating hotels.

item.title: Delta and United Cards Unlock Discounted Award Flights; Other Airlines May Follow
item.description: United and Delta cardholders now have access to discounted award redemptions. Analysts are watching whether other airline loyalty programs will adopt similar pricing.

item.title: How Buying Hotel Points During a Promotion Helped Cover a Flight
item.description: Facing a shortfall in airline miles, a traveler found a cost-effective solution by purchasing Marriott Bonvoy points during a promotional offer.

item.title: A 17-Hour Review of United's Polaris Business Class Suites to Singapore
item.description: United's transpacific route to Singapore's Changi Airport served as the operational debut of the carrier's redesigned Boeing 787-9 Dreamliner business class cabin.

item.title: Guide to Redeeming Amex Membership Rewards Points with Airline and Hotel Partners
item.description: A comprehensive overview of how to transfer and redeem American Express Membership Rewards points across the program's airline and hotel transfer partners.
